title: Zara's Colorful Feelings
synopsis: Join Zara as she learns about different emotions with help from her loving family, discovering that all feelings are okay and how colors can help us understand them.

pages.text: Zara wanted to play with her big brother's toy truck. But he said no. Zara felt very mad!

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes standing with clenched fists, surrounded by swirling angry red spirals and jagged lines filling the background
illustration.alt: Zara looking angry with red swirls around her

pages.text: The mad feeling was hot and red like fire. Zara stomped her feet. She crossed her arms tight.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes stomping with arms crossed, with intense red flames and hot orange swirls creating an abstract emotional landscape behind her
illustration.alt: Zara stomping with red and orange angry colors swirling around

pages.text: Then Zara felt sad. Her mad feeling changed to blue like rain clouds. She wanted to cry.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes with tears in her eyes, surrounded by soft blue raindrops falling from dark blue clouds in an abstract emotional background
illustration.alt: Zara looking sad with blue rain and clouds around her

pages.text: Mama came over. She gave Zara a big, warm hug. 'It's okay to feel mad and sad,' Mama said softly.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes being hugged by her mother, with gentle purple and soft pink swirls mixing with the blue, creating a comforting abstract emotional atmosphere
illustration.alt: Zara being hugged by Mama with calming purple and pink colors

pages.text: Brother came over too. 'I'm sorry, Zara. Want to play together?' he asked with a smile.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes looking at her brother who is holding out the toy truck, with warm yellow and orange rays beginning to peek through the remaining blue emotional clouds
illustration.alt: Zara's brother offering to share with yellow sunshine starting to appear

pages.text: Zara felt happy! The blue rain went away. Bright yellow sunshine filled her heart like warm butter.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes with a big smile, surrounded by brilliant yellow sunshine rays, golden sparkles, and cheerful abstract patterns radiating joy and warmth
illustration.alt: Zara smiling with bright yellow sunshine and golden sparkles all around

pages.text: 'Thank you for helping me with my big feelings,' Zara told Mama and Brother. They played trucks together.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes playing happily with her family, surrounded by a beautiful rainbow of colors - gentle yellows, soft greens, and warm oranges creating a harmonious emotional landscape
illustration.alt: Zara playing with her family surrounded by happy rainbow colors

pages.text: Now Zara knows that feelings come in colors. Mad is red, sad is blue, and happy is yellow sunshine!

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes surrounded by three distinct emotional zones - red angry swirls on one side, blue sad raindrops on another, and bright yellow sunshine rays on the third, all blending together in a colorful emotional map
illustration.alt: Zara in the center of red, blue, and yellow feeling colors

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color was Zara's mad feeling?
questions.explanation: Zara's mad feeling was hot and red like fire!

questions.question: Who helped Zara feel better?
questions.explanation: Both Mama and Brother helped Zara with her big feelings.

questions.question: What color was Zara's happy feeling?
questions.explanation: Zara's happy feeling was bright yellow like sunshine!

questions.question: What did Zara want to play with?
questions.explanation: Zara wanted to play with her brother's toy truck.
